title: Amtech S0504 Hobby and Craft Set Rotary Cutter, Tweezer, A4 Cutting Mat, Sharpening Stone and 31pc Storage Case
features: VERSATILE: This hobby and craft cutting set includes knives with a wide range of blades, as well as an A4 cutting mat and rotary cutter
MANY USES: Supplied in a handy plastic storage case, it is ideal for a wide range of modelling, arts and crafts activities
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description Amtech has a fantastic range of hobby and craft tools and the Amtech S0504 cutting set makes the ideal gift or treats for any arts and crafts enthusiast. Craft anywhere and at any time with the handy storage case and reliable quality. Amtech’s great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products Safety Warning Yes
